name: codex-session-policy
rules: A new Codex session must run npm run resume before editing business code.
Codex must classify the user request as add-feature, update-feature, remove-feature-dry-run, or remove-feature-apply.
Codex must create or update a change record under ai/changes before implementation.
Codex must not mark work complete until registry, graph, memory, docs, and verification evidence are updated.
